summary:
POLITICAL ACTIVISM AND ELECTION OUTCOMES: Brandon urges the church to actively participate in politics by voting for God-fearing leaders and supporting the Save America Act to prevent a Democratic sweep. He emphasizes the importance of voting based on moral values rather than economic convenience, warning that local elections, such as mayoral races, are just as crucial as national ones for preventing destructive leadership.

PROPHETIC VISIONS OF CHURCH DESTRUCTION: Brandon recounts a prophetic warning he received regarding the burning of historic Christian churches across America, Canada, Europe, and Australia. He claims this prophecy is currently manifesting, citing a recent arson attack on a nearly century-old church in New York City by radical groups, which he links to the Islamic Brotherhood, and warns that these events will provoke a massive awakening within the Christian community.

GLOBAL ESCALATION AND ASSASSINATION THREATS: Brandon discusses escalating global tensions, including the end of ceasefire talks with Iran and warnings from Israel regarding Iranian assassination plots against Donald Trump. He specifically cautions Trump against speaking negatively about his own survival, urging him to declare divine protection instead, while also warning about Poland provoking Russia, leading to a catastrophic retaliatory strike on Warsaw with a novel weapon of mass destruction that could trigger World War III and a military draft.

CULTURAL DECAY AND ECONOMIC CONCERNS: Brandon critiques the modern cultural landscape, highlighting issues such as extreme gender identity trends among youth and the appeal of socialist policies offering free services. He also references political maneuvers surrounding the Save America Act, which ensures only American citizens can vote, and shares a vision of a toxic economic stimulus compared to a sludge-filled injection.

TRIBULATION AND END TIMES REVELATION: Brandon shares vivid details of a vision depicting the horrific conditions of the Tribulation period, warning that lukewarm Christians will be left behind to face severe survival challenges, including contaminated water and surveillance by military drones. He describes a violent backlash where angry, left-behind believers will execute preachers who taught a watered-down gospel, and he links modern technological advancements like Starlink and AI to the upcoming Beast system.

YOUTH MINISTRY AND DIVINE REVERSALS: Brandon details the successful acquisition of a building permit for a local youth center called the Red Zone, intended to spark a revival among high school students before a prophesied military draft takes place. He conducts a communion service and extensive prayers for divine reversals of incurable diseases, financial debt cancellation, and relational restoration, while also offering specific prayers of protection over Donald Trump's extended family, particularly warning of threats against Donald Jr. and granddaughter Kai.

PROPHETIC WARNINGS FOR LEADERS AND MINISTRIES: Brandon issues a stern warning to Donald Trump, stating that any political compromise regarding Israel, such as a two-state solution, will result in a supernaturally driven hurricane destroying Mar-a-Lago. Furthermore, he delivers a specific prophetic message to an unnamed female ministry leader about an imminent spiritual transfer of authority, warning her to strictly avoid entering into strife to protect this blessing, while also predicting significant upcoming shakings within the Vatican.
rawData: [July 10, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/0iOZJHUwyjQ]-[So, good mid-morning, afternoon, whatever you want to call this. Thank you for joining us again today. We'll go over some of the things that are going on in the news. Braden has some things for you all, but then we're just going to jump in the river. We're going to pray for things. As I was praying this morning over the rest of this summer for the Clarity Act—that's just really on my heart to push forth the Clarity Act to get this done so that we don't have a landslide victory for the Democratic Party. And you say, 'Are you so political?' Yes. We as a church have to rise up and pray for our leaders. And I want God-fearing leaders in our nation. Regardless of the church, we're going to vote. We're going to go, we're going to vote God-fearing regardless. Usually, the church votes for morals. But the world—we need them to vote morals. And the only way they usually vote that way is if their pocketbook is good, or their pet projects, or whatever they see is good. You know, I mean, the church is usually the only one that votes morals is what I'm trying to say. And that's the way we always go far right, you know, as far as conservative values. But like I said, if the economy is bad and they don't see what they want to see, they all vote far left because we've got to have a change. So that's why I'm saying we need to stimulate the economy with prayer and whatever. I don't know, you know, I don't think like them. They think with a reprobate mind, a carnal mind. And so I try to think, 'Lord, whatever it takes because I want Trump not to have a stalemate presidency over the next two years.' Not just finishing his life, being here and being alive, but finishing strong, that we have a strong presence. We have a year, we have a half a year, and then two years left to pray for this into the 2028 election so that we are able to keep the House and the Senate. It's just so important. There's so much—and not just about the Senate and the House, but our governors and our mayors. As we see Mamdani doing all that he's doing as a mayor. He's not even a governor. Think about that. He's doing this as a mayor of a city like Batman, you know, like the evil over Gotham. And I'm thinking, man, I thought, 'Is he the governor?' And no, I said, 'He's a mayor and he's wreaking havoc.' So, doesn't that tell you how important it is for you to vote in every election? Not just about governors and presidencies, but the mayors are so important over your cities and your towns. We have mayors over every little district and all over the little towns in Oklahoma, over every little area. But it's so important for you to vote godly in every election. That's what I'm trying to tell you. So, we're going to go over today. This is important. Remember what the Lord showed us about fires. And the Lord said, 'They will start to burn down your old churches. They're going to start burning down.' I saw the Islamic Brotherhood burning down, and radical people burning down the churches in America, in major cities, old historic churches. And I said, 'It will become so much in the news that it's going to poke a giant called the church and people are going to get outraged and they're going to be upset.' And I saw it happening in Europe, Canada, and America, up northeast, and they're going to start burning them in the south. They're going to burn churches and they're going to burn down old historic buildings, and it's going to make people, make people very upset. And so we are seeing the fruit of that right now. And these buffoons are burning... This is one right here. This just happened last night. This happened last night. And they're doing it with—they look like Islamic Brotherhood right here. Do you see it? They're taking it and they're just throwing it against our buildings at our churches. This church burnt down at 600 years old in New York City yesterday. 1930s. Thank you, son. I think that was the last one that happened. The last one that happened was 600 years old. Okay, so 600 was the last one. This one's 1930. So this one's about 100 years old. Almost 100 years old. Not quite. But they burnt this building down. Yes, with a Molotov cocktail. They threw it, and this is in New York. New York. Okay, so this guy burnt down. This happened last night. So this is what the Lord showed us was coming. So this is prophetic. It's confirmation. We don't want to be flaky on here telling you what we see coming. And the Lord said they're going to start burning down your churches. And people say, 'Well, Brandon, do you just see all these different things?' Yes, but it's only whenever the cloak comes on. Like you saw yesterday, it is dry. It is as dead, as cold as a stove that's not on. And I couldn't get there yesterday. When that mantle, that glory comes on me, I can feel it. I can see over and I can see what's coming. And the Lord tells us this kind of stuff. That's why I said it's so important; I have to spend time with Him because if I don't have enough time in the river by myself—and like I said, I was distracted with my septic and all the things going on. He said it was dry and I can tell immediately. I said, 'Oh no, here we go.' You cannot—it's not a microwave. I told you it is a process. You spend time with Him. You keep spending time with Him. And the more you spend time with Him, the switch turns on. But if you try to operate underneath that glory without the switch on, you're going to get familiar spirits. You get demonic stuff. You've got to make sure you're underneath there and get real in the river. But this is what we saw and the Lord told us. So here we are. April, the 338-year-old church burns down. June, the 172-year-old church burns down. July the 2nd, churches were firebombed last night. I told you the Lord said they're going to burn down your churches, the Islamic Brotherhood. And we gave that word in May. The Lord gave us the word in May and today's July and it's manifesting. So, the words are happening faster. Yeah, this is just New York though. We saw some in the UK and all that. There's some burning in the UK and Ireland and Canada. Just like the Lord said. And I saw they were going to burn in Australia. I saw they're going to burn all over the place. The Lord said major in Europe in the days ahead. He said the Islamic Brotherhood will rise up huge in France. And I saw old like Notre-Dame burning again. Cathedrals that are like over a thousand years old burning in France, burning. I saw them completely destroyed. Not like last time, you know, when you saw Notre-Dame, it was a big fire, but I saw complete decimation of churches in France and England. So, this is happening just like the Lord said. And the Lord said it will provoke—it will poke a bear—not a bear, I'm sorry, a giant called the church. And so, here's more burning. New York. Yep. 173-year-old building. They're burning it down. They don't like our churches on the corners. They want their mosques. They want their synagogue. They want their Islamic temples. They don't like our churches. So, they're burning our churches down. All right. So, this is what the Lord warned us was coming. And so, okay. Next. And then... let's see. He said the ceasefire is over. The Islamic Republic of Iran has asked for continued talks. We have agreed to do so, but the United States has stated to them in no uncertain terms that the ceasefire is over. So, he's ramping up war and going to finish them off. I believe we're seeing major stuff happening with this. And I believe Trump realizes they're liars. When I talked to Max, he was Islamic and didn't believe in Jesus at all. His wife was a praying woman and loved the Lord, and he was a Palestinian. Jesus saved his soul, and he gave his heart radically to Jesus. He told me on the phone in a conversation, 'It's nothing for the Islamic Brotherhood to lie to you. They lie all the time. They don't tell the truth because it's okay to deceive an infidel. It's okay to do this.' He was telling me, 'It's not wrong in the culture of the radical Islamic to lie to a Christian or to the infidel. They won't lie to each other, but they will lie directly to you and they are ruthless. They don't tell the truth. But it's not wrong to do that because you're deceiving an infidel. You're deceiving people who are not for you. You are not part of the Islamic Brotherhood.' I think that was interesting because I hope Trump understands the culture. He's probably understanding it more and more as he goes that these people are liars on purpose. He says, 'Well, they're lying to us.' Well, yeah, you're not a Muslim; they're going to lie to you. Iran is planning—can you make that bigger? Iran planned a new Trump assassination attempt; Israel warns us. So, Israel is warning that they caught wind of a major attack on our president's life. Life and death are in the power of your tongue. And as you speak life, you bring forth life. When you speak cursings, you bring forth cursings to yourself. That's why you've got to speak good things out of your mouth. You've got to speak life. Because when you speak death out of your mouth and you're saying, 'Well, I'm never going to do anything. I'm never going to have nothing. I'm always going to be sick'—all these things. You're speaking because your tongue is powerful. Whenever you start speaking these things—like he said, 'Well, I'll probably be next'—he's bringing that to him. 'They're probably going to kill me too.' Listen to what he said. Do you hear him on the plane? Can you put that on there? This is what we have to help pray—that these words are returned unto him void. We say they fall to your feet, sir. Life and death are in your tongue. You cannot speak those things. You cannot say that kind of stuff over your life, especially in the position of authority that you're in. You can't say death out of your mouth. You have to speak life, sir. With long life, God will satisfy you. The moment you start agreeing with death, when you start agreeing with destruction to kill, steal, and destroy, you're on the wrong side. You're lining up with the devil and what he has for your life. And we're praying for you. We want you to live. We need you here, sir. We don't want JD Vance. We need you. I would rather have Marco Rubio, but he's not Vice President. When you start saying this kind of stuff out of your mouth, you're agreeing with the enemy. You have to agree with the Lord, and I'm on the Lord's side. You've got to speak what God says about you: that a thousand shall fall at your side and ten thousand at your right hand, but nothing will come nigh you. Don't agree with the death that they say against you, sir. Don't say it. Don't agree with your mouth because we are snared by the words of our mouth, the Bible says. We cannot be snared by our words. By you saying that, don't agree with it because our prayers would block it. Look at this, and this is why we have to pray for him to change that stinking thinking. It's the devil trying to put a seed in his mind. Go ahead. Can you play it? If that's not it, let's move on. I know this is him saying he might be gone. He's just basically saying bad things. He had leaders; they're gone. They had another set of leaders; they're gone. Now they have another set of leaders; they may be gone. Who knows? And you know what? 'I may be gone too because I'm their number one target.' It's out all over the place. 'I'm their number one target because they're scum.' That's the way they act, and that's the way they've done it for 47 years. No, you won't be. You're going to live long. You're going to finish this race. We're going to carry you as the church over this line. He needs help. There's so many around—it's like praying for people that are around and about him to have good godly influence speaking into his life. Take no counsel from the ungodly and being in bad alliances with NATO, with Turkey, and with Syria, and saying they're our friends. No, they are not our friends. They are the Islamic Brotherhood. They hate Israel. They hate the Christians. Regardless of whether they haven't done anything—I don't care—they're planning and plotting. As soon as you become not president anymore, these people are going to push buttons. If Sleepy Joe Biden was behind the wheel right now, Turkey would have already done it. I guarantee you. But the problem is we have a strong leader in their eyes. And thank God Kamala Harris is not president right now. Thank you, Jesus. Thank you, Father. Thank you, Lord. The church is to rise up and vote godly. Father, we thank you that we'll do it again in November. I have a feeling inside. I could feel the pulse of the church in 2024 concerning getting this man in. And we were on it. We were praying, but people were discouraged because of the economy. But it's not just the church; we're just a little bitty bit of people. It's the boomers and the others and the young people that are voting. And when he came against the school thing and saying we're not going to help out with the grants, you got a lot of kids upset about that, the college students that voted for you that are like, 'Hey, we're done.' I'm telling you, we need when you start pushing them to the socialist idiots like Mamdani go, 'We're going to give you free health care, we'll give you free child care, we'll give you free this.' Young people are dumb because they've been watching TikTok. And I don't mean that disrespectfully. There's a handful of you that are smart, but there's a majority of them that are dumb, that don't even know what gender they are. You just got to go to the bathroom and check your parts. That's what you are. Are you a girl? Well, that's what your parts say. Are you a boy? That's what my parts say. I don't know what I am; I identify as a dog, I identify as a cat. And we've got people dressing up as cats and dogs and walking around with leashes on. That's no joke. My nieces and nephews tell us about it. My kids are homeschooled, but they wear collars to class and they put dog ears on and they want to be a dog. And I'm like, 'My God, what's going on with everybody?' Okay, so anything else? And we have the fire. He said he's not going to do the housing bill. He refuses to sign the bipartisan housing legislation in protest of the Senate not passing the Save America Act. So he's not going to pass it. But the problem is that if we don't stimulate this economy, even with that shot—I saw the acid shot sticking in the arm. It was a massive needle, and it was full of acid. I saw housing bumping around in it. I saw percentage rates. I saw the acid flowing on it. Does anybody remember that vision? I saw a massive horse needle. It was full of acid, green and sludge, and they were planning on injecting the arm of the American people with a stimulus. This is interesting. The Save America Act—that's the most important thing I can tell you: to make sure that only American citizens are voting in the election. Look at this craziness right here. They made a Lego figure in Iran and they're hanging him so they could burn it. It's crazy. What is the point of a Lego figure? 'Oh, yeah, okay, so let's just hang him up there with the crane.' That probably cost several thousand dollars to build. It makes them feel better, I guess. Next. So the whole thing about my family telling me about the school loans—did you see that, Braden? He ended it. It was the Biden-era thing. Maybe it's not; we'll talk about it next time, but I thought it was interesting. Poland has launched new... they're saying that Poland and Ukraine are developing active strike capabilities that can reach deep inside Russia. Turn your microphone on because people say they can't hear you. Poland has launched a new production line of domestically developed long-range strike drones, marking the government-backed effort to strengthen the country's deep-strike capabilities. They're wanting to strike deep inside Russia along with Ukraine. The Lord warned us about Warsaw, and he said Putin will strike Warsaw with unconventional weapons of war—weapons that we've never seen before in the days ahead. I saw Warsaw decimated with this new weapon. It was a weapon of mass destruction. I said, 'Lord, is this nuclear?' And he said, 'No, it's like nuclear, but it is not nuclear. It's a weapon you've never seen before.' As it went up, it vaporized everything, but it did not touch the houses or the cars. It burned up everything else, though. It was super hot, but it didn't burn up the cars or the houses; it just did the people. I saw them, and it was in retaliation for long-range missiles going into Moscow, by the Kremlin. I said Poland will provoke—go back to the word—I said Poland will provoke and stick the bear, and the bear will retaliate in the days ahead. That's exactly what the Lord said. Poland will provoke the bear. I've waited and waited. I said, 'Lord, how will Poland provoke the bear?' Then I saw Zelensky. They put in another proxy government with an old man that looked like a gray-headed guy with glasses. I saw him come in, and they split Kyiv. They said this will be pro-Russia and pro-Ukraine in the days ahead. I saw a plan to divide it and an escalation. But then it said 'World War III' above Europe, and when they struck Poland, NATO—all of them jumped in. They said, 'Well, it's time.' Then I saw America sending troops over to Europe, and it was a draft. I saw women and men drafted because of this. What happens to Poland when the Poland thing happens? I want to say something else. Follow me really carefully. The youth building that we're building at Glorious: there's a young man I saw in the spirit that the Lord has wanted to get saved. There's a revival coming from this young man. I saw he was a football player, and the Lord said, 'I want this youth building built across the street for this young man.' But I saw there was a window for this man's life because I saw there would be a draft and that this young man would be pulled into war in the days ahead. I saw that a lot of the youth in certain towns would be called up for war. As I was praying into this—and I've never shared this before—I saw that there was only a window for certain things to happen. As he was finishing high school and getting ready to go into college for football, there would be a season that this young man would be used for war. He would go. I see things way deep and, like I said, I only reveal what I feel peace about revealing, but there are certain things I see in the news now that start to weird me out. I'm just being real with you. Some things we pray away, and the Lord said, 'Some things you'll see that you'll stop; some things you will not.' Like with the Fourth of July—I saw so much detail with the Fourth of July. I walked away from that and said, 'Lord, what happened?' He said, 'Brandon, take it as a win. You don't realize how many hundreds of thousands of you were praying over this. Take it as a win.' There was a de-escalation of people's hearts with the weather and the things that manifested. But he goes, 'There's certain things that will not be stopped through prayer because my word said it would come to pass.' As he told us—the angel stood right there—he said, 'Look at the fig tree. The fig tree is ripe. Ezekiel 38 and 39 is at the door. You don't know where you are in the end times, for an acceleration of things will take place from the seventh month.' I saw the number seven; it was on fire. And he said, 'An acceleration of war, an acceleration of the cleansing of my church with refiner's fire, for I will increase.' 1 Corinthians 5:5—I get the numbers mixed up, I apologize—1 Corinthians 5:5. I will accelerate this from the month of July to January, and it will start to double now, going into 9/11. An acceleration of events will start to take place. He warned me: war, an acceleration. You'll hear of wars and rumors of wars—acceleration. I think even whenever I told Joel Renner—Rick Renner's son, Rick Renner—he came to our church for a while and asked, 'So what's coming?' Sometimes when you say things to people, they look at you like a cow at a new gate—you know, a cow chewing its cud. They look at you like, 'Okay, we'll see what happens.' I say, 'Watch Poland. Watch.' I'm not criticizing him because I don't know him very well, but people ask. I'm just telling you what I see. This is what the Lord shows me. They're always curious. This is what the Lord is showing me: watch Poland; watch all these different areas. I saw war, an acceleration of World War III. This was about a year or two ago, before Rick came to church. I am looking into it. Whenever you're seeing in a vision, sometimes it looks like it's right in front of your face, like it's going to happen tomorrow, but there is a process of time. That's what I'm learning. It's very hard to pinpoint time in visions because God is infinite. When you're looking in a vision, it looks like it's right in front of your face, but sometimes that 'right in front of your face' is two to three years, and sometimes it's tomorrow. Like when I'm seeing churches burning, I'm thinking that's going to happen later on, but it's happening right now. Churches are burning and the Lord said it. I don't try to pinpoint time; I see in part and I hear in part. I don't want to get flaky with it because there's a lot of flakiness in the prophetic, and I think it's because people just don't understand it. Daniel saw things happening in the Tribulation that still haven't come to pass thousands of years later. Daniel said, 'I see this,' and I'm sure he was thinking it was about to happen, but thousands of years later, it still hasn't manifested. People might say he's a false prophet, but he's in the Bible. When you're looking in the spirit, you think it's tomorrow, but it's years. Now Poland is happening. I remember going on Kim Clement's Donne's Channel and I warned about this over a year ago on July 11th. I told y'all what the Lord showed me about this and she said, 'I remember Daddy having a vision about Poland and that area.' She said God sent her father to Poland, and she went there to the woods. I said I didn't see the woods; I saw buildings burning and a major mushroom cloud; it was an acceleration. Going back to all of this: I saw that young man and the youth building, and that's why it's been on my heart to build it so fast. The Lord put it on me to pray over that youth building. The city held it up for so long; they didn't want it built. This is the Red Zone. You see that gap from that building to that building? That's where we're building the new youth building; the structure is being built right now. I just have to make sure... I'm showing it right now. From there to there is where we're building it right now. That is what the city blocked us for over the last year. Finally, we got the permit. I was so excited because we've been praying over this. This is the Red Zone, Champions for Christ. This is where I see this boy coming in across the street from the football stadium. As the church is going on, we have tables out here giving him pizza and Cokes to get them excited. They're making a big garage with a game room for them to come over after the game for an afterparty. We call it the Red Zone. This has been my heart. I've been interceding for this building because the Lord said the young man will be used, he will be put in a school, and revival will come from this boy. He will save lots of college kids because he will be like a David to me. The city blocked it and said, 'We're not going to let you build it.' I said, 'You will; this is discrimination.' They finally let it go. We had 14 people pray and they broke that through. It's being built right there in that field. It's exciting what God is doing in these last days. That field is going to be the new building. The high school stadium is where the Collinsville Cardinals play. They walk across the street and go to the party. That is what my vision is. I saw that young man being drafted to war one day and the Lord said, 'You have a window; things are going to escalate.' You ask, 'Can we stop war?' No, you can't stop war because of wars and rumors of wars in Matthew 24. I believe with all my heart we are in the last of the last days. There'll be things that happen. We can delay it sometimes, but we will ultimately see the end come because Jesus said it would. We're going to see plagues and pestilence; this is the beginning of sorrows. People go, 'Well, Brandon, the Tribulation's not going to be too bad.' It's going to be hell on earth. You've never seen anything like this. Think of when the Romans tortured Christians in the Coliseum and they would send the lions out for sport. They would cheer as they watched Christians be crucified. That's a sick culture. But we are entering into a time of godlessness. The prayer covering will go. I believe in the rapture of the church. When the remnant are taken out, that restraining force called the Church is gone. You're about to see a shaking like you've never seen before. People say, 'I believe there's going to be revival in the Tribulation.' I'm not doubting that people will give their hearts to Jesus Christ, but it's about finishing the race. Everybody can start, but it's about finishing. There'll be many people who start who will not finish. I don't care what you say with your mouth; it's about finishing. Someone might say, 'Well, Brandon, I was all in for a day.' It's about finishing the race. I saw people in the Tribulation who were disappointed and mad at the Lord because they did not have their lamps full of oil and they were left behind. They believed in a false grace gospel that was just a soupy grace. We can live the way we want to live. They live like a bunch of alley cats, sleeping around, doing everything, going to strip clubs, and doing things, thinking, "Well, we're saved, brother, because it's under grace," but they live like hell and didn't think they had to live a pure life. I saw them left and flipping off the Lord. They were giving him the finger. They were cursing him. They were mad because they were left. Then they were looking for the preachers who preached a lukewarm gospel to them, and they hung them right there in the streets; they strung them up. They were mad. They were angry. They would say, "You preached us a false gospel." I saw people on TV—TBN, Daystar, and some of these TV networks that were on there on a regular basis preaching the gospel—who were left behind. They were looking for them and killed them. I'm telling you the truth. I was there with Jesus and I saw them murder those preachers because they did not preach the truth, and they were mad they were left. A lot of them joined up and created communities. They went to the hills, the Ozarks, the Rockies, and the Smoky Mountains, and they had camps or colonies of people. They tried to join together and brought their supplies, but the weather was crazy and it was the coldest winters you can ever imagine. They could not burn fires because the military drones would see them and tell on you. If they saw smoke, heat, or anything through infrared, they would send the troops out to get you. You couldn't stay warm. In the summer, you could keep cool by dipping in the water if you got too hot, but the winter was bad. I saw the people running and trying to hide, trying to stay alive. There was no food and no clean water. There was a pestilence upon the land. As you drank the water, it made you sick, and you had diarrhea and vomiting because people's systems are used to purified water. We don't know what it's like to have dirty water and drink it out of a ditch like some of our ancestors did. They would drink things and boil them to stay alive, but people don't know how to do that now. They're all domesticated. They know how to go to the faucet and turn it on. But if you ask, "How do you stay alive?" you've got to have fire, but you can't purify water without fire. So they're drinking the water and dying. I'm trying to warn you about what's coming. Many of you don't understand the urgency of the hour we're living in right now. Jesus Christ is coming and the water level is getting higher and higher. The boat door is about to close and many of you think you're on the boat and you're not. "Well, you're scaring me." I should be, because it freaked me out. I lived it; I walked it for the time frame with Jesus, and he took me year after year and I saw how it all happened. "I don't believe you." I don't care. You'll see when you're here, because a lot of you won't make it. They're going to cut your head off. If you want to stand for the cause of Christ when the tribulation comes and you're here and you say, "Well, we're just going to live and fight this," you will not. It's literal hell on earth. The food is bad, the water is bad, the environment is crazy. Everything is like on steroids. You think you've experienced something bad before. World War II was a cakewalk. Hitler was a cakewalk compared to the Antichrist. Do you understand? The restraining force was binding Hitler still as the prayer army was rising up and said, "We're not going to have this, Hitler." We rose up and sent our troops over and defeated him. But that was through prayer. You don't realize the blood-bought church, the redeemed, was interceding for Hitler's destruction.
